creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Yusuf,
thanks for patch. I'd suggest simplify the port's Makefile.

The spectrwm's source ships freebsd/Makefile which is usable. If you add "MAKE_ARGS = -C freebsd" can build - so the overwrite of do-build target is unnecessary.
IMHO can remove the do-install target.

The examples are only a few kbytes. If you think can remove the EXAMPLES option and install the examples everytime.
